title: ctenopteris crassifrons
intro: Ctenopteris crassifrons, also known as the 'Rough-leaf fern', is a species of fern native to Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenopteris crassifrons include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Ctenopteris crassifrons is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility and potential health benefits.
